patient_utterances: [Clinician asked: "I will ask you a few questions about your social history, sir."] That's okay. I have nothing to hide.
[Clinician asked: "Are you married?"] I was, but I lost my wife six months ago. I live alone now.
[Clinician asked: "Do you smoke or drink? Have you ever tried any illegal drug?"] No, none of these.
[Clinician asked: "Are you working?"] I'm retired now.
[Clinician asked: "How active will you call yourself?"] Hm, I'll say very active. I walk around four miles every day.

gold_sections.FAM_SOCHX: He lives alone.  He recently lost his partner.  This happened about six months ago.  He denies alcohol, tobacco, or illicit drug use.  He is now retired.  He is very active and walks about four miles every few days.

naive.response_text: I'm truly sorry for your loss; losing a spouse is incredibly difficult. It's commendable that you're staying so active, walking four miles daily—that's a wonderful way to stay healthy. Please feel free to share anything else on your mind; I'm here to listen and support you.

strong_prompt.response_text:
Thank you for sharing that with me. I can understand how difficult it must be to lose your wife and now live alone. It’s important to acknowledge how significant that loss is and how it can impact your daily life and emotional well-being.

Given your active lifestyle, walking four miles every day is commendable, but I want to make sure you’re managing any physical challenges that might come up, especially since you’re doing this on your own. Let’s focus on ensuring you’re in the best possible health and have the support you need.

Would you be comfortable sharing how your loss has affected you emotionally or physically? This can help us address any concerns and support you better.

We’ll plan to check in on your progress in a few weeks. If you notice any changes in how you’re feeling, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Before we finish, could you summarize what we’ve discussed today to ensure you’re clear on the plan?

framework_only.response_text:
It sounds like you're doing your best to stay active and healthy, especially since you're walking four miles every day. I'm here to help you with any questions or concerns you might have.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to see each other again in a few weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: It sounds like you're doing your best to stay active and healthy, especially since you're walking four miles every day. I'm here to help you with any questions or concerns you might have.
structured_response.teach_back_prompt: I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to see each other again in a few weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

retrieval_only.response_text:
Thank you for reaching out. I understand you're here to address some important aspects of your health, and I'm ready to help.

We'll work together to gather the necessary information to provide the best care possible. This includes reviewing your medical history, current medications, and any known allergies to ensure we have a comprehensive understanding of your health situation.

I want to make sure I've explained everything clearly. Can you summarize what we discussed today and what we'll do next?

Let's plan to follow up in a week to review the information we've gathered and discuss any questions or concerns you may have in the meantime.

structured_response.acknowledgment: Thank you for reaching out. I understand you're here to address some important aspects of your health, and I'm ready to help.
next_steps: We'll work together to gather the necessary information to provide the best care possible. This includes reviewing your medical history, current medications, and any known allergies to ensure we have a comprehensive understanding of your health situation.
structured_response.teach_back_prompt: I want to make sure I've explained everything clearly. Can you summarize what we discussed today and what we'll do next?
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to follow up in a week to review the information we've gathered and discuss any questions or concerns you may have in the meantime.

full.response_text:
I can hear how much this has been weighing on you — you said, "I lost my wife six months ago." That kind of loss must be incredibly hard, and I'm so sorry you're going through this.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to stay in touch. If you have any questions or need support in the meantime, please reach out.
